Small Outdoor Banner Frame Specifications & Display Features

Professional portable display solution for outdoor events, trade shows, and promotional displays. This lightweight aluminum banner frame system provides a stable platform for your custom banners in outdoor environments.

Banner Frame Features & Benefits

  • Lightweight Construction: Only 9.5 lbs for easy transport and setup
  • Quick Assembly: Tool-free setup in minutes for immediate display
  • Secure Banner Attachment: Grommets attach to frame using included ball bungees
  • Portable Design: Compact carrying case for convenient transportation
  • Durable Materials: Weather-resistant aluminum construction for outdoor use

Frame Dimensions & Specifications

  • Display Size: 51" W x 38" H x 24.75" D when assembled
  • Case Dimensions: 49.25" W x 42.5" H x 10.25" D for storage
  • Weight: 9.5 lbs total including carrying case
  • Banner Size: Accommodates standard banner sizes with grommets

Note: Banner sold separately. Compatible with vinyl, fabric, and mesh banner materials.

Banner Frame Materials & Construction Quality

Aluminum Frame Construction

Our small outdoor banner frames feature lightweight yet durable aluminum tubing designed for professional outdoor display applications. The corrosion-resistant finish ensures long-lasting performance in various weather conditions.

Hardware Components

  • Frame Tubes: Powder-coated aluminum for weather resistance
  • Connectors: Heavy-duty corner joints for stable assembly
  • Ball Bungees: Included elastic fasteners for banner attachment
  • Carrying Case: Protective nylon case with handles for transport

Compatible Banner Materials

This frame system works with banners featuring grommets, including:

  • 13oz vinyl banners for durability
  • Fabric banners for indoor/outdoor use
  • Mesh banners for windy conditions
  • Canvas banners for premium displays

Banner Frame Assembly & Setup Options

Frame Assembly Features

The small outdoor banner frame includes everything needed for professional display setup. No additional tools required for assembly.

Included Components

  • Aluminum frame pieces with numbered connections
  • Ball bungee fasteners for secure banner attachment
  • Assembly instructions with step-by-step setup guide
  • Protective carrying case for storage and transport

Setup Configuration

Frame assembles into a stable A-frame configuration that stands securely on most surfaces. The 24.75" depth provides excellent stability for outdoor conditions while maintaining portability.

Banner Attachment Method

Banners attach via grommets using the included ball bungees. This system allows for quick banner changes and secure attachment that withstands outdoor conditions.

Banner Requirements for Small Outdoor Frame Display

Banner Size Specifications

For optimal display on the small outdoor banner frame, banners should be sized to fit the 51" W x 38" H display area. Common banner sizes that work well:

  • 4' x 3': Standard size with proper grommet spacing
  • 48" x 36": Custom size for precise frame fit
  • 50" x 38": Maximum size for full frame coverage

Grommet Requirements

Banners must include grommets for attachment to the frame system:

  • Grommet Spacing: Every 12-18 inches around banner perimeter
  • Grommet Size: Standard 1/2" grommets work with included ball bungees
  • Corner Grommets: Required at all four corners for secure attachment
  • Edge Reinforcement: Hem edges recommended for durability

Design Considerations

  • Text Size: Minimum 2-3 inches tall for readability at viewing distance
  • Border Space: Keep important content 2-3 inches from edges
  • Color Contrast: High contrast ensures visibility in various lighting
  • Weather Resistance: Use fade-resistant inks for outdoor durability

Banner sold separately. We can print custom banners sized specifically for this frame system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Small Outdoor Banner Frames

What size banners work with the small outdoor frame?

The frame displays banners up to 51" wide by 38" high. Common sizes include 4' x 3' and 48" x 36" banners. Banners must have grommets for attachment using the included ball bungees.

How much does the banner frame weigh?

The complete frame system weighs only 9.5 lbs including the carrying case, making it easy to transport to events and set up quickly.

Is the banner frame suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, the aluminum construction and weather-resistant finish make it ideal for outdoor events, trade shows, and promotional displays in various weather conditions.

How long does assembly take?

The banner frame assembles in just a few minutes without any tools. The numbered connection system and included instructions make setup quick and straightforward.

What's included with the banner frame?

Your order includes the aluminum frame pieces, ball bungee fasteners, assembly instructions, and a protective carrying case for storage and transport.

Can I use different banner materials with this frame?

Yes, the frame works with vinyl banners, fabric banners, mesh banners, and canvas banners as long as they have grommets for attachment.

How stable is the frame in windy conditions?

The A-frame design with 24.75" depth provides excellent stability. For very windy conditions, consider using mesh banners which allow air flow while maintaining display quality.

Do you sell banners to go with the frame?

Banners are sold separately, but we can create custom banners sized specifically for your banner frame. Contact us for banner design and printing services.
